## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in the control plane.

## Risk

Describe compatibility, persistence, scheduling, isolation, or security impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Relevant demo or migration path exercised
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-visible behavior

## Evidence

Include exact results, screenshots, logs, or artifact IDs needed to review the claim. Remove secrets,
credentials, hidden tests, and sensitive model prompts.
